title: Scrollable Tooltips
description: Adds the ability to scroll on long item tooltips
body:
The Official Sk1er Scrollable Tooltips. Scrollable Tooltips allows you to scroll up/down (mouse wheel) or left/right (mouse wheel + shift) when an item's tooltip doesn't fit on the screen.
